Description: Summon forth your eggeater, an anteater raised on a luxurious diet of eggs.
Description{Enhanced}: Under the patronage of its mistress, Rowena, this widowmaker has led a pampered life. As it was impractical to feed it the prodigious quantities of ants its kind consumes in the wild, however, it was instead raised on a diet of beaten eggs. This specimen is well accustomed to men, and permits those it trusts to ride upon its back.
Tooltip:
We can ill afford to place
all our eggs in one basket.
   - Erenville

Description: Summon forth your hovering hot pot. Formerly a ritual cauldron, it now soars the skies while simmering with scrumptious morsels.
Description{Enhanced}: Long ago, when a ritual cauldron was accidentally used to cook dinner for the lord of Yanxia, a strange phenomenon occurred which saw the vessel rise into the air like the fiery wheels of divine legend. Thereafter, subsequent generations of rulers took to filling the cauldron with various delicacies, which they enjoyed even as they hovered in the heavens.
Tooltip:
What is this? It smells...spicy.
   - Erenville
